author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone 

 Destination Starbase is Imminent! (Miner Ships)

Equip yourself with the dual function Armstrong miner ships today and prepare yourself for the next generation of mining at 6PM EST / 10PM UTC ()!

Destination Starbase brings you 3 new and unique ship models that equip players' fleets for gameplay in a real resource economy:

Armstrong IMP Tip - Small Miner
🔹Daily ATLAS Emissions (Faction Fleet): 36
🔹Daily R4 Emissions (Faction Claims): Fuel: 22,299 | Food: 22,713 | Toolkits: 20,547 | Ammo: 23,539
Armstrong IMP Tap - Medium Miner
🔹Daily ATLAS Emissions (Faction Fleet): 104
🔹Fuel: 62,985 | Food: 64,155 | Toolkits: 58,038 | Ammo: 66,489
Armstrong IMP - Capital Miner
🔹Daily ATLAS Emissions (Faction Fleet): 1,108
🔹Fuel: 712,900 | Food: 726,143 | Toolkits: 656,913 | Ammo: 752,558
The IMP ship models have a unique dual function; they can:
 Participate in Faction Fleet to earn ATLAS, or
 Participate in Faction Claims to emit R4 resources

Additionally, we're updating individual ship configurations on our Galactic Marketplace. These V2 updates include:
 Crew
 Components
 Modules
 Note: Crew Stations and Interior Modules are a work in progress and will be added in the future.
 Learn more: https://lore.staratlas.com/ship-manufacturers-configurations-and-politics/ship-configuration

Interested in a brand-new Armstrong miner ship?
The first 30% of the total ship quantity of each ship will have a 50% discount on the origination price, so get them discounted while you can!

Brochure: https://staratlas.com/destination-starbase/brochure.pdf
More details on Destination Starbase: https://medium.com/star-atlas/destination-starbase-star-atlas-new-mining-ships-armstrong-industries-72fd0cfc1775

 | Get your miner ships here: https://play.staratlas.com/market/
